film.title: Gandhi, My Father
film.overview: Unable to live in his father's gigantic shadow, Mahatma Gandhi's eldest son, Harilal, gets distraught and resorts to alcoholism.

dialogues.dialogue: We can`t watch you in this condition. Now you don`t need to hide your face from public. Really. it's a shame. that you had to bare all this. thank You very much. Don`t be formal Hari Brother.
Brother Abdullah, You are safe just because of Gandhi`s name. That`s why you are getting your breakfast here. You ashamed our selves. You are getting wrong our hosting. it`s a limit.
dialogues.cause_raw: Misusing Gandhi's name for personal benefits

dialogues.dialogue: You came here to meet me while you drunk! I came here to meet you I ain`t drunk. Babu, He drunk. Don`t you ashame your self? I came here to meet you. Get lost from here. Bapu, Ba`s calling you.

as soon as I will take you in africa don`t think about it just study and become Big man. and Mother and Father proud on your and me too. I will wait for you. Hari Bhai.. Driver become angry he want to take other passenger.

Don`t be afraid on this matter today we again got chance to enjoy..once again they put into jail Barrister Ghandi. I am proud of my father..what is this nonsense.. that a barrister who obey british rules. who doing work honestly in the society of british. they told them to give the finger prints.
